description_long: This is a double-leaf swing gate constructed from dark green metal, featuring a gently curved top rail and a series of vertical bars beneath it. The lower section of each leaf is adorned with a prominent crisscross lattice pattern, adding both structural integrity and decorative appeal. The gate is joined at the center by a vertical post, suggesting it opens outward or inward from this midpoint. The overall design is both functional and ornamental, suitable for driveways, garden entrances, or residential property boundaries. The surface appears smooth and painted, with no visible handles or locking mechanisms from the provided views. The gate's proportions indicate it is intended to restrict vehicle and pedestrian access while maintaining an open, airy aesthetic.
description: A dark green, double-leaf metal swing gate with a curved top rail and crisscross lattice pattern, designed for decorative and access control purposes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, curved top, and lattice pattern of the gate.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile and depth of the gate structure.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same curved and lattice features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the gate.
